name: Ma Financial Group Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.6200, stop A$5.6133, target A$7.6100 (0.98:1) — then trail it.
